stages.summary: You arrive at the ruined stairway before the buried sanctum.
A weathered rune at the entrance hints that the seal can still be opened.
You mapped the collapsed hall and found the safe route deeper inside.
The trap chamber revealed the pattern needed to cross the old defenses.
The altar seal has been broken and the relic is within reach.
You secured the relic, but the ruin feels ready to swallow everything.
You returned from the ruins with the relic intact.
You left the ruins before the expedition could truly be completed.
